emails.subject: RE: "Force Majeure"
emails.body: RE: "Force Majeure" Dan, Sorry to keep bothering you, but does what we talked about earlier pertain to EOL trades as well given the language in those contracts, i.e. requiring outside parties to honor contracts if they claim "force majeure"? Thanks, Eric x3-0977

emails.subject: RE: "Force Majeure"
emails.body: Please see item 8 of the attached GTC. When the outside party does not provide the Gas from an alternate source or fails to take the Gas to an alternate market, such event is a default allowing us to collect damages for non-performance. No different than any of our standard Enfolio contracts. The current language in our GISB form gets us to the same result. Eric Bass 12/06/2000 01:36 PM
